title: Scaffold CLI project
description: Create the initial project skeleton and CLI entrypoint for Waystation in Bun + TypeScript.
acceptance: The project defines a runnable waystation CLI entrypoint (run via bun).
A placeholder CLI runs locally (e.g. waystation --version).
The project has test, typecheck (tsc --noEmit), and lint/check scripts.
notes: Done 2026-07-06. Stack: Bun + TypeScript, commander, zod v4, bun:sqlite, proper-lockfile, Biome, bun:test. Canonical records are JSON. package.json pins real versions (no ^latest, no placeholder MCP dep).
